tasks.subject: Task 1: release_suffix + version-marker helpers (ahand-platform)
tasks.description:
release_suffix() matching release-rust.yml suffixes; version_file/read/write marker helpers; TDD.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/ahand-platform/src/paths.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p ahand-platform paths", "acceptanceCriteria": ["suffix matches release matrix", "marker round-trip"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: native upgrade check (GitHub releases resolution)
tasks.description:
ahandd updater helpers pub; ahandctl upgrade/ module: release.rs resolution + check mode; injectable api/download bases; stub-API integration test.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/ahandd/src/updater.rs", "crates/ahandctl/src/upgrade/mod.rs", "crates/ahandctl/src/upgrade/release.rs", "crates/ahandctl/tests/upgrade_release.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p ahandctl", "acceptanceCriteria": ["check mode parity", "AHAND_DIR/AHAND_VERSION honored", "no subprocess for own version"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: full native upgrade (download/verify/swap/admin-spa)
tasks.description:
assets.rs: downloads+sha256+daemon stop+swap_binary_into (rename-aside, ahandctl self-swap)+admin-spa safe extraction+version marker; upgrade.sh deprecated+SUFFIX bug fixed; full-flow + bad-case tests.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/ahandctl/src/upgrade/assets.rs", "crates/ahandd/src/updater.rs", "scripts/dist/upgrade.sh"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p ahandctl -p ahandd", "acceptanceCriteria": ["checksum-mismatch aborts pre-install", "tar traversal rejected", "windows self-swap rename-aside"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: scripts/dist/install.ps1
tasks.description:
PowerShell 5.1-compatible bootstrap: version resolve, download .exe assets, Get-FileHash verify, admin-spa via tar, USER Path idempotent append, version marker.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/dist/install.ps1"], "verifyCommand": "pwsh -NoProfile parse check; CI in task 5", "acceptanceCriteria": ["AHAND_VERSION/AHAND_DIR overrides", "no PATH duplicates", "5.1-compatible syntax"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: test-dist-scripts windows job for install.ps1
tasks.description:
windows-latest job with mocked release server; asserts install layout, version file, PATH idempotency across two runs.

```json:metadata
{"files": [".github/workflows/test-dist-scripts.yml"], "verifyCommand": "gh run watch (PR/dispatch)", "acceptanceCriteria": ["green on windows-latest", "idempotency asserted"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: README + spec M2 completion record
tasks.description:
README Windows quick-start + native upgrade docs; spec M2 Completion Record with user-pending manual verification list.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["README.md", "docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-11-cross-platform-windows-linux-design.md"], "verifyCommand": "cargo check --workspace", "acceptanceCriteria": ["docs match implementation"]}
```
